title: ipomoea aquatica var. aquatica
intro: Ipomoea aquatica var. aquatica, also known as swamp morning glory, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea aquatica var. aquatica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
